raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Reverse Centaur’s Guide to Life After AI,’ by Cory Doctorow
book_title: ‘The Reverse Centaur’s Guide to Life After AI,’ by Cory Doctorow
description: In “The Reverse Centaur’s Guide to Life After AI,” the renowned tech critic Cory Doctorow tries to find a good way to coexist with artificial intelligence.
